You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/catalog/templatescatalog/components/TemplatesCatalogEmptyState.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 46
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

```
   45          <EmptyStateActions>
   46            <Button onClick={() => onClearFilters()} variant="link">
   47              {t('Clear all filters')}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 24
Rule [family:EmptyState]:
## EmptyState Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <EmptyState headerClassName={...} headingLevel={...} icon={...} isFullHeight={...} status={...} titleClassName={...} titleText={...} variant={...}>
    <EmptyStateBody />
    <EmptyStateFooter />
    <EmptyStateActions />
  </EmptyState>
```

Props that stay on <EmptyState>: headerClassName, headingLevel, icon, isFullHeight, status, titleClassName, titleText, variant

Add imports: EmptyStateBody, EmptyStateFooter, EmptyStateActions from '@patternfly/react-core'

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
  className -> headerClassName (renamed, type unchanged)
  children -> status (TYPE CHANGED):
    old: React.ReactNode
    new: 'danger' | 'warning' | 'success' | 'info' | 'custom'
New props on replacement:
  isFullHeight: boolean
  variant: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'full'

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 24: [sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap]

    module: @patternfly/react-core

  Line 37: (same rule sd-cf-emptystate-emptystate-req-wrap)

    module: @patternfly/react-core
    parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
    parentName: EmptyState

      Strategy: LlmAssisted
      Component: EmptyState
      Replacement: EmptyStateBody

```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 3
Line: 46
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: EmptyStateActions

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   45          <EmptyStateActions>
   46            <Button onClick={() => onClearFilters()} variant="link">
   47              {t('Clear all filters')}

```

### Fix 4
Lines: 23, 36
Rule [sd-new-absorbing-prop-emptystate-titletext]:
Component <EmptyState> has a new prop `titleText` (type: `React.ReactNode`) added in v6 that accepts JSX content.

This prop may be intended to receive content that was previously passed as children. Review the JSX children of <EmptyState> and determine if any should be moved to the `titleText` prop.

Example migration:
  Before: <EmptyState>{content} other children</EmptyState>
  After:  <EmptyState titleText=>other children</EmptyState>

Incident context:
  componentName: EmptyState
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: EmptyState
Prop: titleText
To: React.ReactNode

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 23):
   22      return (
   23        <EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.lg}>
   24          <EmptyStateHeader

  (line 36):
   35    return (
   36      <EmptyState variant={EmptyStateVariant.sm}>
   37        <EmptyStateHeader

```

### Fix 5
Line: 11
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-emptystate-emptystateheader-d-ts-emptystateheaderprops-removed]:
Interface 'EmptyStateHeaderProps' was removed (interface): Exported interface `EmptyStateHeaderProps` was removed — migrate to `EmptyStateProps`.
  Matching props (use on `EmptyStateProps` instead): children, className, headingLevel, icon, titleClassName, titleText

File: packages/react-core/src/components/EmptyState/EmptyStateHeader.d.ts
Before: interface: EmptyStateHeaderProps

Incident context:
  importedName: EmptyStateHeader
  localName: EmptyStateHeader
  module: @patternfly/react-core

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
From: EmptyStateHeaderProps
To: EmptyStateProps
Replacement: EmptyStateProps
Member mappings:
  titleText -> titleText
  headingLevel -> headingLevel
  icon -> icon
  titleClassName -> titleClassName
  className -> headerClassName
  children -> status

Code context:
```
   10    EmptyStateFooter,
   11    EmptyStateHeader,
   12    EmptyStateVariant,

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260608T145537/kubevirt-plugin/source/src/views/catalog/templatescatalog/components/TemplatesCatalogEmptyState.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: Button variant type changed
Line 46: `variant="link"` — The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type (`'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`). **No change needed.**

### Fix 2: EmptyState Family Migration (EmptyStateHeader removal)
Lines 24 and 37: `EmptyStateHeader` is used with props `headingLevel` and `titleText`. In PF v6, `EmptyStateHeader` is removed and its props (`headingLevel`, `titleText`, `icon`, `titleClassName`, `className→headerClassName`) move directly onto `<EmptyState>`. So I need to:
- Move `headingLevel` and `titleText` from `<EmptyStateHeader>` to `<EmptyState>`
- Remove the `<EmptyStateHeader ... />` elements entirely

### Fix 3: Button icon children to prop
Line 46: The Button contains `{t('Clear all filters')}` — this is text, not an icon. There are no icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons` inside this Button. **No change needed.**

### Fix 4: New `titleText` absorbing prop on EmptyState
Lines 23 and 36: The `titleText` content is currently on `<EmptyStateHeader>`. When I apply Fix 2, `titleText` will move to `<EmptyState>`. This fix is effectively handled by Fix 2. **Applied together with Fix 2.**

### Fix 5: Remove `EmptyStateHeader` import
Line 11: After removing all `<EmptyStateHeader>` usage (Fix 2), the import becomes unused and must be removed.

Let me apply all changes:

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| Fix 1 | `Button.variant` type changed | **No change needed** | The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. No code modification required. |
| Fix 2 | EmptyState family migration (`EmptyStateHeader` removal) | **Applied** | Moved `headingLevel` and `titleText` props from `<EmptyStateHeader>` to `<EmptyState>` at both locations (lines 23–27 and 36–40). Removed the two `<EmptyStateHeader ... />` elements entirely. |
| Fix 3 | Button icon children to `icon` prop | **No change needed** | The `<Button>` at line 46 contains only text (`{t('Clear all filters')}`), not an icon from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No migration required. |
| Fix 4 | New `titleText` absorbing prop on `<EmptyState>` | **Applied (with Fix 2)** | The `titleText` prop was already present on `<EmptyStateHeader>` and was moved to `<EmptyState>` as part of Fix 2. Both locations now have `titleText` directly on `<EmptyState>`. |
| Fix 5 | Remove `EmptyStateHeader` import | **Applied** | Removed `EmptyStateHeader` from the `@patternfly/react-core` import block since it is no longer referenced after Fix 2. |
